Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT MARILYN ROBERTSON'S MOTION TO VOID DEFAULT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND GRANT LEAVE TO DEFEND ACTION

Appearances:
Elia Deluca of Lynch Gilardi & Grummer (397-2800) for cross defendant and moving party
Eric Oto (213-623-8891) for cross-complainant and responding party

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted pursuant to CCP 473.5(c). Cross-defendant to pay cross-complainant's attorneys' fees in seeking the default in the sum of $1615.00. The request to surrender the hard drives is denied. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/xAH) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Kimberly Jennings, CSR 11452
